author: Tim Rice <tim.j.rice@hackrange.com>
name: bizlogic_coupon_reuse_or_stack
summary: Detects coupon-reuse or coupon-stacking flaws — same code accepted multiple times, or distinct codes combining past intended cap.

args.--coupon: Primary coupon code to test for reuse (default canary prefix)
args.--coupon-secondary: Distinct second code for stacking test
